## Automated Tests Required

### N2-001 EndlessDifficultyProvider — Logic

**Test file path**: `Assets/Trizzle/Tests/Endless/EndlessDifficultyProviderTest.cs`
**What to test**:
- StatMultiplierMin/Max scale correctly per wave (TR-endless-001)
- EnemyCountMultiplier = 1.0 (Endless uses wave formula, not count multiplier)
- HealDropMultiplier decreases per wave, floor at 0.1 (G-007)
- PacingMultiplier decreases per wave, floor at 0.5 (G-006)
- RewardMultiplier = 1.5 (flat)
- IsBossExemptFromCount = true
- SetWave(N) updates all computed properties for wave N

**Estimated test count**: ~7 unit tests

---

### N2-002 EndlessWaveProvider — Logic

**Test file path**: `Assets/Trizzle/Tests/Endless/EndlessWaveProviderTest.cs`
**What to test**:
- enemyCount(wave) = 4 + Floor(wave * 0.5) (TR-endless-002)
- eliteRatio(wave) = Min(0.50, wave * 0.02) (TR-endless-003, G-008)
- enemyTypeCount(wave) = Min(5, 1 + Floor(wave/5)) (TR-endless-004)
- GetNextWave returns WaveData with correct counts
- Wave 30+ with 19+ enemies stays within performance budget (G-001)

**Estimated test count**: ~6 unit tests

---

### N2-003 EndlessSessionController — Logic

**Test file path**: `Assets/Trizzle/Tests/Endless/EndlessSessionControllerTest.cs`
**What to test**:
- Wave loop: SetWave on providers before SpawnNextWave (R-013)
- 3s breathing window between waves (TR-endless-007)
- Draft every 5 waves via DraftRunController.ShowDraft() (TR-endless-005)
- Boss wave every 10 waves (TR-endless-006)
- No mid-run save; quitting = run lost (TR-endless-010)
- Death triggers score persist and death screen

**Estimated test count**: ~8 unit tests

---

### N2-004 Boss Wave Cycling — Logic

**Test file path**: `Assets/Trizzle/Tests/Endless/BossWaveCyclingTest.cs`
**What to test**:
- Boss spawns at wave 10, 20, 30, 40, 50 (cycle A-E)
- Cycle restarts at wave 60+ (TR-endless-006)
- Endless bosses are 2-phase only (not 3-phase)
- BossCycle array must contain exactly 5 entries (G-013)

**Estimated test count**: ~5 unit tests

---

### N2-007 Endless Draft Integration — Integration

**Test file path**: `Assets/Trizzle/Tests/Endless/EndlessDraftIntegrationTest.cs`
**What to test**:
- Draft appears at wave 5, 10, 15, etc. (TR-endless-005)
- Class filtering applies (Mage skills for Mage, Archer for Archer) (TR-endless-005)
- DraftRunController unaware of Endless wave numbers (F-014)
- EndlessSessionController calls ShowDraft(), not the reverse

**Estimated test count**: ~4 integration tests

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### N2-005 Endless Arena Setup — Config/Data

- [ ] Single 30x30 unit arena scene/prefab exists
- [ ] Arena archetype tag set
- [ ] No traps in Endless arena
- [ ] 6 spawn points at correct positions
- [ ] Arena loads without errors

### N2-006 Score & Leaderboard — UI

- [ ] Death screen shows: waves cleared, total kills, combos discovered, class used (TR-endless-014)
- [ ] Per-class leaderboard persists via LevelStats with "Endless_Mage" / "Endless_Archer" IDs (R-024)
- [ ] Score = waves cleared (TR-endless-009)
- [ ] Leaderboard displays correctly after multiple runs

---

## Smoke Test Scope

1. Game launches to main menu without crash
2. New game → Normal campaign → first room playable
3. **New for Sprint 8**: Endless Mode entry from menu
4. **New for Sprint 8**: Endless wave loop progresses (wave 1 → 2 → 3...)
5. **New for Sprint 8**: Draft appears at wave 5
6. **New for Sprint 8**: Boss spawns at wave 10
7. **New for Sprint 8**: Death screen shows score and leaderboard
8. **New for Sprint 8**: Score persists between Endless runs
9. Existing campaign features still work — regression gate
10. Existing combos and boss abilities still work — regression gate
11. Frame time within 16.6ms budget during Endless wave 10+

---

## Playtest Requirements

*No dedicated playtest sessions required for Sprint 8. PT-001 (new-player playtest) deferred to when full campaign loop is playable (Rooms 1-5 authored + Endless available).*

---

## Entry / Exit Criteria

**Entry**:
- [x] Sprint 7 QA sign-off: APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS
- [x] E1-001 and E1-002 complete (Room Content foundation)
- [x] E3 Boss Phase stories complete (boss prefabs available for Endless cycling)
- [ ] ADR-0007 status = Accepted (check before N2-001)

**Exit**:
- [ ] All Must Have stories have passing unit tests or manual evidence
- [ ] Endless Mode wave loop works end-to-end (entry → waves → draft → boss → death → score)
- [ ] `production/qa/smoke-2026-06-XX.md` exists with verdict PASS
- [ ] `production/qa/qa-signoff-sprint-08-2026-06-XX.md` exists with APPROVED or APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS
- [ ] No S1 or S2 bugs

---

## Definition of Done — Sprint 8

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for all Visual/Feel and UI stories
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions introduced
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/simplify` or `/review`)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
- [ ] `production/sprint-status.yaml` reflects story's status

---

## Next Steps

1. Verify ADR-0007 status before starting N2-001
2. Run `/story-readiness` on N2-001 before starting implementation
3. `/dev-story` per story in critical-path order (N2-001 first)
4. `/smoke-check sprint` after all Must Have stories complete
5. `/team-qa sprint` to execute this plan and produce the sign-off report
